overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy approaching and climbing wooden scaffolding near a beached sailing ship to reach a massive mechanical Tallneck. The scene takes place in a sunny coastal settlement with clear skies and tribal wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal settlement dock with beached galleon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the wooden ship and mechanical Tallneck structure ahead

notable_agents.action: villager standing near the thatched hut, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: large wooden galleon with multiple masts and tattered sails beached on the sand
massive giraffe-like machine with teal and bronze armor plating
small tribal building with straw roof and wooden supports
stacked wooden crates and barriers forming a climbing structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks across sandy ground toward a large beached sailing ship and a towering mechanical Tallneck in the distance. A thatched hut stands to the left where a villager stands idle, and wooden barricades are stacked in the foreground.

events.description: character transitions from walking to climbing up the wooden barricades and platforms

agents.ego_description: climbing up stacked wooden crates and scaffolding to reach higher ground near the Tallneck

entered.detail: tall wooden masts with rigging rising from the beached vessel
tattered canvas sails hanging from the ship's rigging

segments.scene_description: The character climbs the wooden scaffolding, bringing the massive mechanical Tallneck into close view on the right. The ship's masts and sails become prominent overhead as the camera ascends, while the coastal hut disappears behind. The ground transitions from sand to wooden platforms as the character ascends toward the machine.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sandy coastal settlement up into the heights of a wooden structure toward a massive mechanical entity. It begins with the character walking across the sand past a thatched hut and stacked barricades, heading toward a beached sailing ship and a distant Tallneck. As the character begins to climb, the perspective shifts from the ground to wooden scaffolding, causing the coastal huts to disappear below. The scene then ascends further, bringing the ship's masts and sails into prominent view overhead while the towering mechanical Tallneck looms closer on the right. Finally, the camera reaches a high vantage point on the wooden platforms, completing the transition from the open beach to the heights of the machine's vicinity.
